title: User Management — Edit User Modal
description: Add edit functionality to the users table. Admin can edit name, email, role and active status of existing users.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button on each user row opens a modal pre-filled with current user data
Admin can edit: name, email, role, isActive
Submit sends PATCH /api/users/:id with changed fields only
User list refreshes after successful edit
Modal closes on success and shows error message on failure
Password is not editable in this modal
implementationNotes: Reuse the existing modal pattern from the create user flow
PATCH /api/users/:id may already exist — check before adding
Only send fields that have changed to avoid overwriting with stale data
isActive toggle should be a checkbox or toggle, not a text field
